scores_before.rationale: A comprehensive, well-organized, and current DevOps/SRE skill with concrete checklists, tool references, and anti-patterns, though its breadth trades off some depth in any single area.

scores_after.rationale: Exceptionally detailed, current, and actionable DevOps skill with concrete frameworks, tool tables, and anti-patterns, only lacking a touch more brevity/consistency to be flawless.

scores_before.rationale: Exceptionally thorough, current, and actionable DevOps skill with concrete frameworks, checklists, and up-to-date tooling guidance, though its length and density slightly strain quick scannability.

scores_after.rationale: A thorough, well-organized, currently-informed DevOps/SRE reference with concrete checklists, tool tables, and anti-patterns that make it highly actionable.

scores_before.rationale: A well-organized, richly detailed synthesis of established engineering wisdom with credible 2025-2026 currency additions, though some sections (e.g., anti-patterns, tech reference) slightly overload the actionable core with reference material.

scores_after.rationale: A comprehensive, well-organized synthesis of software engineering wisdom with concrete decision frameworks, current tooling references, and clear output standards, though some sections lean more philosophical than immediately actionable.

scores_before.rationale: A comprehensive, well-organized synthesis of established software engineering wisdom with concrete decision frameworks, output standards, and current tooling references, though some sections lean toward reference material rather than directly actionable steps.

scores_after.rationale: A comprehensive, well-organized synthesis of classic engineering wisdom with concrete decision frameworks, processes, and current tooling references, though some sections lean more descriptive than prescriptive.

scores_before.rationale: Comprehensive, well-organized, and actionable testing framework with concrete thresholds, decision tables, and anti-patterns, though a few numeric targets (e.g., mutation score, coverage percentages) are asserted without sourcing.

scores_after.rationale: Exceptionally thorough, well-organized, and current testing skill with concrete frameworks, tool references, and anti-patterns, losing minor points only for being dense enough to require selective application.

scores_before.rationale: Exceptionally well-organized, persona-rich skill with strong actionable frameworks and coverage across platforms, though currency claims are self-labeled as time-bound and unverifiable given fast-shifting platform mechanics.

scores_after.rationale: Exceptionally thorough, well-organized skill with strong actionable frameworks and current platform awareness, losing a few points for being dense enough that some sections border on prose over scannable structure.

scores_before.rationale: A well-structured, richly detailed skill with clear gates, modes, and templates, losing minor points for currency (no versioned framework/date anchors) and actionability (some guidance is stylistic rather than procedural).

scores_after.rationale: Exceptionally well-organized, concrete, and current skill with clear dual-gate quality framework, mode dial, templates, and cross-skill integration, though breadth slightly exceeds what a single skill file can fully operationalize.

scores_before.rationale: A well-organized, richly detailed persona skill with clear modes, templates, and anti-patterns, though some sections (frameworks/templates references) push depth out-of-file, slightly reducing self-contained actionability.

scores_after.rationale: Exceptionally well-organized, concrete, and current skill with clear gates, modes, templates, and anti-patterns, though its comprehensive dual-persona scope makes some sections dense to apply quickly.
